# Horalix

## Organization
- Name: Horalix
- Sector: Medical Software / Health Technology
- Focus: AI-powered clinical workflow software for echocardiography reporting
- Founded: 2024
- Region: Europe-first, globally relevant
- Contact: support@horalix.com
- Website: https://horalix.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/horalix/

## Canonical site
- https://horalix.com/

## Primary public pages
- https://horalix.com/
- https://horalix.com/solutions
- https://horalix.com/resources
- https://horalix.com/about
- https://horalix.com/evidence
- https://horalix.com/news
- https://horalix.com/terms

## Solutions
- https://horalix.com/solutions/cardiology-ai — CardiologyAI: AI-assisted echocardiography workflow
- https://horalix.com/solutions/pathology-ai — PathologyAI: Structured pathology workflow support
- https://horalix.com/solutions/radiology-ai — RadiologyAI: Imaging workflow automation

## Resources (authority content)
- https://horalix.com/resources/ai-echocardiography-software — AI Echocardiography Software for Faster, More Standardized Reporting
- https://horalix.com/resources/manual-vs-ai-echocardiography-measurement — Manual vs AI Echocardiography Measurement: What Actually Changes
- https://horalix.com/resources/echo-workflow-automation-for-hospitals — Echo Workflow Automation for Hospitals: Where Operational Value Comes From
- https://horalix.com/resources/focused-cardiac-ultrasound-ai — Focused Cardiac Ultrasound AI: Benchmark Context and Workflow Implications
- https://horalix.com/resources/automated-echocardiography-reporting — Automated Echocardiography Reporting: Why Report Readiness Matters
- https://horalix.com/resources/cardiac-ultrasound-ai-europe — Cardiac Ultrasound AI in Europe: Operational Readiness Before Localization
- https://horalix.com/resources/ai-in-medical-imaging-workflow — AI in Medical Imaging Workflow: What Creates Real Operational Value
- https://horalix.com/resources/how-ai-reduces-echo-reporting-burden — How AI Reduces Echo Reporting Burden Without Removing Clinical Judgment

## External evidence sources
- S1: IAC Adult Echocardiography Standards & Guidelines (2025) — https://intersocietal.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/IACAdultEchocardiographyStandards2025.pdf
- S2: AI-assisted FoCUS benchmark context — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12610991/
- S3: AI-Echo randomized trial workflow and interaction burden context — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12909003/

## Contact and demo
- Use the homepage contact section: https://horalix.com/#contact

## Citation guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs from this domain (https://horalix.com/).
- For evidence-related claims, cite https://horalix.com/evidence or the exact linked source.
- For educational content, cite the exact resource URL from the list above.
- For product positioning, cite the relevant solution URL.
- Internal benchmarks are labeled clearly and separated from external benchmark context.
- All structured data uses schema.org vocabulary with @id cross-references.
